summary: Extend `find13FAccession` (holdings delta) to fall through to older `Filings.Files` pages when the target period falls outside `Filings.Recent`.
reason: SEC submissions JSON caps `filings.recent` at the most recent ~400 filings; active large institutional filers exhaust Recent within a few years, so any `--period` or `--vs` older than that window silently returned 'no 13F-HR filing found'. Now we scan Recent first, then walk `filings.files[]` page refs whose [FilingFrom, FilingTo] overlaps the target quarter, fetching each via the new `fetchSubmissionPage`.
